title: Turning Strava data and gym photos into a training recap with my coding agent
abstract: Tired of summarizing your runs and gym sessions? Fear not, with my coding agent, your Strava data and gym photos transform into a training recap in no time! From morning sweat to evening snapshots, everything gets streamlined. Give it a try and make your fitness journey more engaging!
abstract_zh: 你还在为每次跑步后的总结发愁吗？别担心，有了我的编程助手，你的Strava数据和健身房照片瞬间变成训练小结！从晨跑的汗水到晚练的照片，一键生成，轻松掌握每一步进步。赶快试试吧，让你的健身之路不再单调！
